title: Taiga Painting
description: A painting of the old growth spruce taiga
body:
This resource pack adds a painting of the old growth spruce taiga.

I think it fits in quite well with the vanilla paintings.

![The painting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fe639476f356a4dd9c98bbbfb7cfab09838b91f.png)
